result.summary: The page layout is generally functional with no critical breaks, though there are minor visual crowding and standard horizontal clipping issues.

issues.description: Game cards on the right edge are clipped mid-image to indicate scrollability, which can look slightly untidy on certain screen widths.
issues.suggestion: Adjust container padding or card widths to ensure a cleaner visual cutoff at the viewport boundary.

issues.description: The information icon ('i') on the bottom left of game tiles is very small and lacks sufficient contrast against some game backgrounds.
issues.suggestion: Add a semi-transparent dark circular background behind the info icon to improve visibility and tap target area.
